items.title: Action items assigned in AEO Tracker
items.summary: Crista from Influex assigned two action items: grant GA4/GTM access to tech@influex.com and compile external citation links for Charlotte Mag #1, Castle Connolly, Andrew Weil, and SSRP.
items.actionNeeded: Review and complete the two assigned action items in the AEO Tracker document.

items.title: UPQODE coordinating with Influex on AEO alignment
items.summary: Val from UPQODE responded to Angela at Influex to schedule a sync call ensuring their SEO work aligns with Influex's AEO efforts. Collaboration between vendors is underway.
items.actionNeeded: Monitor vendor coordination; no immediate action needed unless alignment issues arise.

items.title: UPQODE SEO/AEO plan clarification on paid ads
items.summary: Will approved UPQODE's plan after Val clarified the rationale for running paid ads alongside SEO/AEO efforts for user behavior insights and synergy.
items.actionNeeded: None; plan approved and vendor moving forward.

items.title: Podcast interview scheduled with Dr. Meg Mill
items.summary: Interview Valet scheduled a podcast appearance on 'A Little Bit Healthier' for July 1, 2026 at 8am ET via Zoom. One sheet and headshot provided.
items.actionNeeded: Confirm calendar holds for July 1 at 8am ET and prepare for podcast interview.

items.title: 2MM onboarding materials uploaded, website copy audit pending
items.summary: Janelle from 2 Market Media confirmed receipt of social media links and articles. Discovery package includes a website copy audit after Brand Bible finalization, which may recommend changes to website currently in production.
items.actionNeeded: Share personal website link and branding assets once available; be aware of potential copy change recommendations.
